# EventIngestor Contract

<!-- Generated by go run ./tools/eventauthority -write-doc. Do not edit by hand. -->

Executable SSOT: [`event-ingestor-contract.riido.json`](event-ingestor-contract.riido.json).

Evidence artifact: `event-authority-evidence`.

EventIngestor owns CanonicalEvent envelope completion and validation.

- `OccurredAt`
- `Scope`

- `EventID`
- `EventSchemaVersion`

- `PolicyBundleVersion`

## Rules

- `CanonicalEvent append has exactly one code path: EventIngestor single append API.`
- `Adapter implementations do not import EventIngestor.`
- `Reducer cannot call EventIngestor; it is pure.`
- `RunController lives outside adapter implementations.`
- `If ingest is down, RunController preserves the no-drop backpressure contract.`

Adapters observe provider output and do not append CanonicalEvent directly.
